content_body:
Looking for fun activities for your teens or for the whole family? Enjoy Blue Ridge, GA's new popular and exciting venue, Vertigo Pinball! Offering pinball machines dating back to the 1990's all the way to current. No tokens, quarters, or dollar bills. Buy a wristband and play a few hours, all day, all weekend - the choice is yours! Enjoy unique eats - fancy grilled cheese, paninis, and more - regional beers, wine, and cider - Coke, Sprite, Lemonade and Water. 

Perfect activity for Father's Day, birthday party, guy's trip, or even a rainy day in Blue Ridge!
title: Vertigo Pinball
